message:
Running command: 
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== Step 68 (STA mid-PnR-3) contents ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/68-openroad-stamidpnr-3/" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== Step 69 (Detailed Routing) contents ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/69-openroad-detailedrouting/" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== Steps after 69 (if any) ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/" | grep -E "^d" | awk '{print $NF}' | sort -t'-' -k1 -n | tail -20
